sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19044" key="baqukrh/pis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθῠ-κρήπῑς</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ϊδος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n19044.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with deep foundations,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἄβυδος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:229" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">229</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
